name: USERINPUT
description: Collect user feedback via GUI. Opens a Tkinter window for multi-line input with system prompt injection, queue management, and auto-commit hooks.

queue.description: Manage the prompt queue (add, delete, reorder, list, GUI editor)

args.name: --add TEXT
args.help: Add a prompt to the queue

args.name: --delete ID
args.help: Delete a queued prompt by index

system-prompt.description: Manage system prompts appended to every feedback output

args.name: --delete ID
args.help: Remove a system prompt by index

config.description: View or update USERINPUT configuration values

args.name: --cpu-timeout N
args.help: Max seconds to wait when CPU is high

enquiry-mode.description: Toggle persistent enquiry mode (bypasses queue for all calls)

args.name: --hint TEXT
args.help: Pre-fill the feedback text area with a hint

args.name: --enquiry
args.help: Bypass queue for this single call
